label: CEX-C
notes: Harvested from a live CEX-C (July 2026). ASP.NET WebForms. Rater-owned fields (6 competency ratings, global summary, feedback boxes) ARE included so the trainee can DRAFT the assessment for the assessor to review, edit and validate with THEIR OWN PASSWORD (never touched by us). Extraction hints forbid inventing any rating or feedback not actually stated. CEX-C has SIX consent-focused competency items (data-rating-id 67-72) and its OWN score-ids (28=N, 29=D, 30=S, 31=O) — DIFFERENT from DOPS (16-25 / 9,10,11,32). Its global summary is by TRAINING STAGE (Level 0-4), not DOPS's supervision levels. Ratings are clicked divs (inputType 'ratingGrid'); 'ratings_all' (ratingDefault) applies a blanket assessor statement to items not rated individually. Pickers are AJAX widgets: reference only, user picks on-site. Dates dd/mm/yyyy.

fields.label: Assessment date
fields.extractionHints: Date the consent encounter took place. Accept spoken dates.

fields.label: Assessor (rater)
fields.extractionHints: Assessing consultant. Reference only — the user picks them in ISCP's picker.

fields.label: Hospital
fields.extractionHints: Hospital. Reference only — picked on the form.

fields.label: Brief summary of case
fields.extractionHints: One-line summary, e.g. 'Consent for laparoscopic cholecystectomy'. NO patient identifiers.

fields.label: Clinical setting
fields.extractionHints: Where it happened ('in clinic' -> Clinic; 'on the ward' -> Ward; ITU -> Hospital - Critical care).

fields.label: Clinical setting (other)
fields.extractionHints: Only if 'Other'.

fields.label: Emergency or elective
fields.extractionHints: Emergency or elective.

fields.label: New or follow-up
fields.extractionHints: New patient or follow-up.

fields.label: Case complexity

options.label: 2. Appropriate for the completion of early years training or early specialty training
3. Appropriate for the central period of specialty training

fields.extractionHints: Complexity 1-4. Map 'level three'/'complexity 3' to the numbered option.

fields.label: Critically ill patient
fields.extractionHints: Was the patient critically ill/unstable?

fields.label: Simulated setting
fields.extractionHints: Usually No for a real patient.

fields.label: Simulation details
fields.extractionHints: Only if simulated.

fields.label: Performed on a course
fields.extractionHints: Usually No.

fields.label: Course details
fields.extractionHints: Only if on a course.

fields.label: Focus of encounter
fields.extractionHints: Which aspects the encounter covered (several allowed). For a CEX-C, Consent and Explanation usually apply.

fields.label: Rating for all competencies (unless rated individually below)
fields.extractionHints: A BLANKET rating the assessor gave covering the competencies they didn't single out — 'satisfactory for everything else', 'the rest were fine'. Set ONLY if such a general statement was actually made; it fills every item not rated individually. N/D/S/O.

fields.label: 1. Demonstrates sound knowledge of indications and contraindications specific to the procedure under discussion, including alternatives to surgery
fields.extractionHints: The ASSESSOR's rating for competency 1 ('Demonstrates sound knowledge of indications and contraindications specific to the procedure under discussion, including alternatives to surgery'). Set ONLY if their judgement for THIS item was specifically stated. Do NOT put a blanket 'everything else' rating here — that goes in 'Rating for all competencies'. Never guess. N/D/S/O.

fields.label: ↳ Comment on 1
fields.extractionHints: Any specific comment the assessor made about competency 1. Record only what was said.

fields.label: 2. Demonstrates awareness of sequelae of operative or non operative management
fields.extractionHints: The ASSESSOR's rating for competency 2 ('Demonstrates awareness of sequelae of operative or non operative management'). Set ONLY if their judgement for THIS item was specifically stated. Do NOT put a blanket 'everything else' rating here — that goes in 'Rating for all competencies'. Never guess. N/D/S/O.

fields.label: ↳ Comment on 2
fields.extractionHints: Any specific comment the assessor made about competency 2. Record only what was said.

fields.label: 3. Demonstrates sound knowledge of complications of surgery
fields.extractionHints: The ASSESSOR's rating for competency 3 ('Demonstrates sound knowledge of complications of surgery'). Set ONLY if their judgement for THIS item was specifically stated. Do NOT put a blanket 'everything else' rating here — that goes in 'Rating for all competencies'. Never guess. N/D/S/O.

fields.label: ↳ Comment on 3
fields.extractionHints: Any specific comment the assessor made about competency 3. Record only what was said.

fields.label: 4. Explains the surgery to the patient/relatives/carers and checks understanding
fields.extractionHints: The ASSESSOR's rating for competency 4 ('Explains the surgery to the patient/relatives/carers and checks understanding'). Set ONLY if their judgement for THIS item was specifically stated. Do NOT put a blanket 'everything else' rating here — that goes in 'Rating for all competencies'. Never guess. N/D/S/O.

fields.label: ↳ Comment on 4
fields.extractionHints: Any specific comment the assessor made about competency 4. Record only what was said.

fields.label: 5. Explains likely outcome and time to recovery and checks understanding
fields.extractionHints: The ASSESSOR's rating for competency 5 ('Explains likely outcome and time to recovery and checks understanding'). Set ONLY if their judgement for THIS item was specifically stated. Do NOT put a blanket 'everything else' rating here — that goes in 'Rating for all competencies'. Never guess. N/D/S/O.

fields.label: ↳ Comment on 5
fields.extractionHints: Any specific comment the assessor made about competency 5. Record only what was said.

fields.label: 6. Professionalism
fields.extractionHints: The ASSESSOR's rating for competency 6 ('Professionalism'). Set ONLY if their judgement for THIS item was specifically stated. Do NOT put a blanket 'everything else' rating here — that goes in 'Rating for all competencies'. Never guess. N/D/S/O.

fields.label: ↳ Comment on 6
fields.extractionHints: Any specific comment the assessor made about competency 6. Record only what was said.

fields.label: Global summary

options.label: Level 0: Below that expected for early years training
Level 1: Appropriate for early years training
Level 2: Appropriate for completion of early years training or early specialty training
Level 3: Appropriate for central period of specialty training

fields.extractionHints: The assessor's overall level, if stated ('he said level 3'). Leave blank if not said.

fields.label: Rater feedback: general
fields.extractionHints: General feedback the assessor gave. Record ONLY what was said — never compose feedback.

fields.label: Rater feedback: strengths
fields.extractionHints: Strengths the assessor identified. Only what was said; blank if none stated.

fields.label: Rater feedback: development needs
fields.extractionHints: Development needs the assessor identified. Only what was said; blank if none stated.

fields.label: Rater feedback: recommended actions
fields.extractionHints: Actions the assessor recommended. Only what was said; blank if none stated.

fields.label: Trainee comments
fields.extractionHints: The trainee's own comments — your account, in your words.

fields.label: Reflection visibility
fields.extractionHints: Only set if the user says so.

fields.label: Reflection: what I learnt
fields.extractionHints: Reflective. Captured for reference; NOT auto-filled in v1 (guarded paraphrasing is a later phase).

fields.label: Reflection: what I did well
fields.extractionHints: Reflective. Captured for reference; NOT auto-filled in v1 (guarded paraphrasing is a later phase).

fields.label: Reflection: what to improve
fields.extractionHints: Reflective. Captured for reference; NOT auto-filled in v1 (guarded paraphrasing is a later phase).
